data.descriptionShort: See sustainable results, reduce stress, and fall in love with fitness!

modules.categories: Slim & Sculpt, Cardio, Core, Mobility & Flexibility, Strength

modules.title: Is FIRE AND FLOW right for me?
modules.content: FIRE AND FLOW is a 4-week program that takes the stress out of getting fit. You’ll alternate high-intensity strength and cardio FIRE days with low-impact, body-shaping FLOW days to help you see real, sustainable results, reduce stress, and fall in love with fitness!

modules.title: What are the FIRE AND FLOW workouts like?
modules.content: You’ll love training the FIRE AND FLOW way! Work out 6 days a week for just 25–30 minutes a day. Start with Jericho’s high-intensity FIRE workouts to help sculpt lean muscle, boost your metabolism, and define your body. The next day, you’ll bring balance to your routine with Elise, whose low-impact FLOW workouts help build core strength and improve your mobility. Alternating the two helps you see lasting physical change, while being good to your body and mind! Craving more workout variety? There are also 4 FIRE and 4 FLOW Bonus workouts that target your abs, glutes, arms, and flexibility.

modules.title: Exclusively on BODi: 2 FIRE Rides and 2 FLOW Rides
modules.content: If you have a BODi subscription and the BODi Bike, check out Jericho and Elise’s FIRE and FLOW Rides. You can swap Cardio FIRE for a FIRE Ride or Restorative FLOW for a FLOW Ride. FIRE Rides are a great low-impact cardio alternative, while FLOW Rides deliver a spicier recovery workout if you want it.

modules.title: Tools & Equipment
modules.content: Start with the Step-by-Step Guide, which outlines 7 simple steps for transforming your physical and mental well-being with FIRE AND FLOW. Then, check out the Quick Start Nutrition Guide which has an overview of Shakeology and BODi Performance supplements—these will help you get the most out of your FIRE AND FLOW workouts. Your Workout Calendar lays out your workout schedule for the next 4 weeks. You’ll also get a FIRE AND FLOW 4-Week Journal. Filled with short, feel-good prompts, it’s part healthy habit-creator, part place to hype yourself up and practice self-care on this journey. You’ll need light, medium, and heavy dumbbells for FIRE AND FLOW, as well as Resistance Loops. A mat is optional.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: Ilana Muhlstein holds a Master of Science degree in applied nutrition from Northeastern University and is a Registered Dietitian Nutritionist—the highest standard in the field of nutrition. She is also a mother of 3. She’s the creator of 2B Pregnant and the 2B Mindset eating plan, and author of the bestselling book You Can Drop It! She was an obese child who lost over 100 pounds using the principles that became 2B Mindset.
